channel.title: Chrome — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Chrome (chrome).

item.title: CVE-2026-15131 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Navigation in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to bypass site isolation via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-15107 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in IndexedDB in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-15130 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient policy enforcement in Navigation in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to bypass site isolation via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15128 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Forms in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to inject arbitrary scripts or HTML (UXSS) via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15127 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in WebGL in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to inject arbitrary scripts or HTML (UXSS) via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15126 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Forms in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15125 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in Forms in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15124 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient policy enforcement in Passwords in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to bypass same origin policy via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15123 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Inappropriate implementation in DOM in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15122 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in Codecs in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium sec…

item.title: CVE-2026-15121
item.description: Use after free in WebRTC in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15120 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Core in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15119 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Race in GetUserMedia in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15118 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Input in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15117 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Payments in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker who convinced a user to engage in specific UI gestures to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15116 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Actor in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15115 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: Insufficient validation of untrusted input in WebAppInstalls in Google Chrome on Android prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a local attacker to bypass same origin policy via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15114 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds read and write in Codecs in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted video file. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15113 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Autofill in Google Chrome on Android prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15111 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Views in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker who convinced a user to engage in specific UI gestures to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15110 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Extensions in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed an attacker who convinced a user to install a malicious extension to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted Chrome Extension. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15109
item.description: Uninitialized Use in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15108 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Integer overflow in Extensions API in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed an attacker who convinced a user to install a malicious extension to perform an out of bounds memory read via a crafted Chrome Extension. (Chromium security severity:…

item.title: CVE-2026-15133 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in InterestGroups in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15132 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Uninitialized Use in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-15129 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Views in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-15112 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Ozone in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.115 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-14426 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker who convinced a user to engage in specific UI gestures to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14394 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-14432 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-14393 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-14403 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-14419 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Skia in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-14417 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Dawn in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-14424 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in Dawn in Google Chrome on Mac prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14425 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14390 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14398 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Use after free in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)

item.title: CVE-2026-14405 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Uninitialized Use in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-14399
item.description: Uninitialized Use in Dawn in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-14408
item.description: Uninitialized Use in Dawn in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-14421
item.description: Uninitialized Use in Dawn in Google Chrome on ChromeOS prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Medium)

item.title: CVE-2026-14413 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Uninitialized Use in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14418
item.description: Uninitialized Use in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to leak cross-origin data via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14402
item.description: Uninitialized Use in ANGLE in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to obtain potentially sensitive information from process memory via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14431 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Type Confusion in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14423 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Type Confusion in Tint in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14395 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds write in V8 in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Low)

item.title: CVE-2026-14392 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds write in Tint in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

item.title: CVE-2026-14400 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Out of bounds write in ANGLE in Google Chrome prior to 150.0.7871.46 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)
